s // 10, 1))\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(step_index: int) -> float:\\n        if step_index < warmup_steps:\\n            return float(step_index + 1) / float(warmup_steps)\\n        progress = (step_index - warmup_steps) / max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1)\\n        cosine = 0.5 * (1.0 + np.cos(np.pi * progress))\\n        return 0.1 + 0.9 * cosine\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda=lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Under a fixed 256-step budget, the baseline is under-optimized for early progress.
